description_long: This object is a round apple with a slightly irregular, natural shape and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin displays a blend of red and yellow hues, with subtle gradients and speckling typical of many apple varieties. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light softly, and there are no visible stickers or labels. The apple appears fresh, with no visible bruises, cuts, or blemishes on its skin. Its size and proportions are consistent with a medium to large apple, suitable for eating. The coloration and texture suggest it is ripe and ready for consumption.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with a smooth, glossy skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Front view shows a rounded apple with a visible stem and a prominent yellow-red gradient.
description_view_1: Side view highlights more yellow on the lower left and a smooth, unblemished surface.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a deeper red coloration and less visible stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side shows a balanced mix of red and yellow, with the stem slightly obscured.
